Split vertical composition with NO GAP between the two sections - they are tightly joined at a single horizontal seam line. Top section: full front-facing headshot showing the COMPLETE head from top of hair to chin, filling the entire top half. Bottom section begins IMMEDIATELY at the bottom of the chin, with NO empty space, gap, or padding between sections. Bottom section: full-body three-view orthographic turn-around (front, side, back) of the BODY ONLY - the neck area aligns with the top edge of the bottom section as if the photograph was cropped just above the shoulders, giving the natural impression that the head is simply outside the frame rather than removed. No face appears in the bottom section. Same background throughout. Retro pixel art style, visible pixel grid, limited color palette, 16-bit video game aesthetic, clean pixel edges, 8K. In the visual style of Jurassic Park: warm golden hour backlighting, dramatic lens flares, awe-filled wide shots, sweeping orchestral visual scale, tension built through shadow and silhouette. Consistent seamless background color throughout the entire composition, unified color palette.
